query: Which city did Mira choose for the Q3 offsite?

raw_events.text: Mira said the Q3 offsite should be held in Lisbon because the team needs a direct flight from Boston.
A later planning note mentioned Porto as a rejected option because the venue was unavailable.

extracted_memory.text: Mira chose Lisbon for the Q3 offsite.
Porto was considered for the Q3 offsite but rejected.

gold_evidence.text: Mira chose Lisbon for the Q3 offsite.
